course_title: FRENCH FOR SPEAKERS OF OTHER ROMANCE LANGUAGES
description: Accelerated development of oral, reading and writing skills up to a level equivalent toFRENCH 102. Instruction draws on features shared by Romance languages, with focus on distinctions particular to French.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ITALIAN 204,SPANISH 204, orPORTUG 202. Not open to students with credit forFRENCH 102
